posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Exciting news! The monday.com certification workshops are going to New York, Denver and Washington DC and our community gets a special discount (20% off with the coupon: monday20community)

These workshops are specifically designed to upskill champions and power users, led by our top-notch monday.com experts. It’s an incredible opportunity for a deep-dive learning experience that will elevate user proficiency with our platform. The exclusive package includes in-person training at our monday offices, alongside the online work management core certification. It’s a power-packed combo to enhance monday skills!

Join us for our core work management workshop

New York : May 6th
Denver: May 13th
Washington DC: May 21st
